title: Trainee, Project Management
description:
Company Description

At Konecranes, we believe that great customer experience is built on the people behind the Konecranes name. Everything we do, we do with passion and drive. We believe diversity drives business success and is the foundation for our growth. We welcome different backgrounds and skills that enrich our community and we promote a place where we can ALL be ourselves. This is what makes Konecranes a unique place to work.

Job Description

Job Summary:

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Trainee, Project Management to join our team. As a Project Management Trainee, you will assist in planning, executing, and closing projects under the guidance of senior project managers. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in managing real-world projects across various domains.

Key Responsibilities:


Organizing Kick off meeting for all assigned new order with Internal stake Holders for smooth order transfer.
Preparation and control of schedules/project plans for all orders.
Conduct regular planning & review meetings to ensure project timelines.
Single window for all communication with Customer in regard to approvals, project schedules and delivery plans.
Organizing Inspections as required under QAP.
Coordination with site team for schedules and ensuring project timelines.
Project milestone update to customer.
Coordination with design team for the detail engineering.
Cost management/Budget control with the help of senior manager.
SAP Knowledge would be an extra advantage.
Coordination with commercial team on AR (account receivables).
Coordination with site team for project closure.
Maintain project documentation and ensure compliance with internal processes
Awareness of ISO 14001 & 45001 Standards


Qualifications

Diploma (DET) – Electrical/Mechanical.

Experience: Fresher or 0-1year experience.

Competencies and skills, we expect for this role:


Excellent written and verbal communication
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); familiarity with tools like SAP & MS Project is a plus.
Ability to work with team to achieve goals.
Target Driven
Eagerness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment


Additional Information

What we offer you:

In return, we can offer you exciting and challenging Specialist – Project Management and flexible working environment to form a part of the Konecranes & Demag Industrial Cranes India team, you will create value added support locally and in delivering services as per our Lifting People Strategy.

Please apply through www.konecranes.com/career

Konecranes moves what matters. We are a global leader in material handling solutions, serving a broad range of customers across multiple industries. We consistently set the industry benchmark, from everyday improvements to the breakthroughs at moments that matter most, because we know we can always find a safer, more productive and sustainable way. That's why, with 16 000+ professionals in over 50 countries, we are trusted every day to lift, handle and move what the world needs.

Konecranes is committed to ensuring that all employees and job applicants are treated fairly in an environment which is free from any form of discrimination.
Show more

title: Human Resources Intern
description:
Job Title: HR INTERN

About Us

“Capco, a Wipro company, is a global technology and management consulting firm. Awarded with Consultancy of the year in the British Bank Award and has been ranked Top 100 Best Companies for Women in India 2022 by Avtar & Seramount. With our presence across 32 cities across globe, we support 100+ clients across banking, financial and Energy sectors. We are recognized for our deep transformation execution and delivery.

WHY JOIN CAPCO?

You will work on engaging projects with the largest international and local banks, insurance companies, payment service providers and other key players in the industry. The projects that will transform the financial services industry.

MAKE AN IMPACT

Innovative thinking, delivery excellence and thought leadership to help our clients transform their business. Together with our clients and industry partners, we deliver disruptive work that is changing energy and financial services.

#BEYOURSELFATWORK

Capco has a tolerant, open culture that values diversity, inclusivity, and creativity.

CAREER ADVANCEMENT

With no forced hierarchy at Capco, everyone has the opportunity to grow as we grow, taking their career into their own hands.

DIVERSITY & INCLUSION

We believe that diversity of people and perspective gives us a competitive advantage.




We’re Hiring: HR Intern (Full-Time | Contract to Hire)

Are you a recent MBA (HR) graduate looking to kick-start your HR career with hands-on exposure to HR operations, documentation, and process excellence in a global environment? This opportunity is for you!

🔍 Role Overview

We are hiring one HR Intern to support our HR team in clean-up and validation of Employee Personnel Files (P-Files) across APAC regions ahead of an SAP migration, and to assist in revising, updating, and publishing HR Process SOPs.

This role is ideal for a detail-oriented fresher who enjoys working with documents, process improvements, and structured data.

📍 Location & Work Model

Location: EC, Bengaluru
Work Model: Hybrid – Office on Tuesday & Wednesday
Shift: 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM IST
Weekly Off: Saturday & Sunday

⏳ Contract Details

Type: Intern (Full-Time)
Duration: 3 Months (Contract-to-Hire opportunity)
Notice Period: Immediate

✅ Key Responsibilities

Clean, organize, and validate Employee Personnel Files (P-Files) for APAC employees
Ensure documents meet compliance and audit standards
Assist in reviewing, updating, and formatting HR Process SOPs
Support SOP version control and publishing
Coordinate with the Hiring Manager/Coach for documentation accuracy
Maintain strict confidentiality of employee data

🎓 Eligibility & Skills

MBA / PGDM in HR (Fresher preferred | 0–6 months experience)
Strong MS Office skills (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Excellent written and verbal communication
High attention to detail and process orientation
Willingness to work on documentation-heavy tasks




If you are keen to join us, you will be part of an organization that values your contributions, recognizes your potential, and provides ample opportunities for growth. For more information, visit www.capco.com. Follow us on Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

Show more

title: Marketing Intern- MBA Graduate ONLY
description:
Role: Marketing Intern

Experience : MBA Graduate - 6 months Internship Exp

Job Type: On Site | 6 days

Stipend : 13,000 per month

Location : Vijaya Bank Layout

Immediate Joiner 




Mandatory Skills: 

Proficient in Advanced Excel, including VLOOKUP, HLOOKUP, and Pivot Tables

Strong communication skills

Excellent command of English, both written and verbal

The candidate must be a graduate, as we are not considering applications from pursuing students.




We are looking for a dynamic and enthusiastic Marketing Candidate to join our team. This role is perfect for someone passionate about marketing, e-commerce marketplaces, and understanding consumer behavior. You will work closely with our marketing and sales teams to execute campaigns, analyze product performance, and support the growth of client accounts.




Key Responsibilities:

Work closely with leading e-commerce platforms such as Amazon, Flipkart, Zepto, Blinkit, and others.
Assist in listing, cataloging, and optimizing products on online marketplaces.
Collaborate with the design team for campaign creatives and product visuals.
Monitor competitor activities, conduct price benchmarking, and stay updated on product trends.
Analyze campaign performance and prepare basic performance reports.
Coordinate with internal teams including sales, logistics, and customer service to ensure smooth execution of marketing efforts.




Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, E-commerce, or a related field.
Fresher in marketing or e-commerce.
Basic understanding of marketing principles or online marketplaces is a plus.
Strong communication and organizational skills.
Proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets and comfort with basic analytics.
A keen interest in learning and growing within the marketing and e-commerce space.
A quick learner with a detail-oriented mindset.
Ability to multitask and manage timelines effectively.




Location: Vijaya Bank Layout Bangalore | Notice Period: Immediate Joiner

title: CA Fresher - Finance Analyst
description:
Responsibilities

For CA freshers only

Strategy and Planning


Strategic Planning: Participate in the development of long-term financial strategies, plans and objectives that align with the organizations mission and goals.
Business Planning: Conduct analysis and provide recommendations on business opportunities, market trends and competition.
Financial Projections: Prepare financial projections and provide insights into the organizations future financial performance.
Resource Allocation: Analyze and evaluate the allocation of resources to ensure optimal utilization of resources to achieve strategic goals.
Performance Tracking: Develop and implement performance tracking mechanisms to monitor progress against strategic plans and objectives.
Budgeting: Participate in the development and implementation of budgeting processes that support the organization's strategic goals.
Risk Management: Conduct risk assessments and develop risk mitigation strategies to minimize the impact of potential risks on the organization's financial performance.
Business Intelligence: Gather, analyze and interpret business data to provide insights into the organizations performance and future trends.
Market Analysis: Conduct market research and analysis to identify market trends and provide insights into the competitive landscape.
Performance Management: Develop and implement performance management processes that support the organization's strategic objectives.


Budgeting and Forecasting


Preparation of Budget: Prepare and maintain budgeting templates, develop detailed budget plans and monitor budget performance regularly.
Forecasting: Prepare financial forecasts using historical data and market trends, and provide regular updates to management.
Cost Analysis: Analyze cost structures and trends to identify areas for cost reduction, and provide recommendations to management.
Revenue Forecasting: Analyze revenue data, prepare revenue projections and provide recommendations to management on revenue growth opportunities.
Scenario Planning: Develop various forecasting scenarios to evaluate potential outcomes and support decision-making.
Variance Analysis: Analyze variances between actual and budgeted results and provide recommendations for improvement.
Trend Analysis: Monitor industry trends, competitor trends and economic trends to provide insights and support decision-making.
Risk Management: Assess and identify financial risks associated with budget and forecast outcomes and provide recommendations for mitigating such risks.
Collaboration with Business Units: Work with business units to understand their operational plans and incorporate them into budget and forecast plans.


Financial Planning and Reporting


Prepare and analyze financial reports: Generate and review financial statements, income statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements and other reports to provide insights into the financial performance of the organization.
Financial Planning: Develop and implement financial plans, budgets and forecasts that align with the organization's goals and objectives.
Variance Analysis: Conduct variance analysis to identify areas of overspending or underspending and provide recommendations to management.
Performance Evaluation: Evaluate the financial performance of the organization and provide recommendations to improve financial results.
Reporting to Management: Provide regular updates to management on the financial performance of the organization and highlight key financial metrics.
Stakeholder Reporting: Prepare and distribute financial reports to stakeholders, including shareholders, banks, and regulatory agencies.
Budget Monitoring: Monitor the organization's budget and ensure that expenditures are aligned with the approved budget.
Financial Dashboards: Develop and maintain financial dashboards to provide real-time insights into the organization's financial performance.
Financial Trends Analysis: Analyze financial trends, both internally and in the market, to provide insights into the organization's financial position.
Forecasting: Develop and maintain financial forecasting models to predict future financial results and identify potential risks and opportunities.


Analytics


Dashboard Development: Develop and maintain dashboards, scorecards and other reporting tools to provide actionable insights on business performance.
Predictive Modelling: Use statistical analysis and machine learning algorithms to predict future trends, patterns and potential risks.
Big Data Analysis: Work with large datasets and leverage data analytics tools to uncover insights and improve decision-making.
Financial Forecasting: Use analytics techniques to generate accurate and timely financial forecasts.


Cost Optimization: Utilize analytics to identify cost-saving opportunities and improve the efficiency of business operations.


Customer Analysis: Analyze customer data to understand buying patterns, preferences and identify opportunities for growth.
Sales Analysis: Analyze sales data to understand market trends, customer behavior and identify opportunities for growth.
Supply Chain Analysis: Analyze supply chain data to identify bottlenecks, improve efficiency and reduce costs.
Performance Monitoring: Monitor key performance indicators and provide regular reports on business performance.
Data Visualization: Create data visualizations to communicate complex data insights in an easy-to-understand format.
Show more

title: Chartered Accountant (Fresher)
description:
We are looking for dynamic CA Freshers to join Ola’s Finance team across multiple verticals such as FP&A, Controllership, Business Finance, and Taxation. The role offers exposure to end-to-end finance operations, business partnering, financial management, and cross-functional collaboration in a fast-paced environment.




Key Responsibilities:

Support budgeting, forecasting, and monthly financial performance analysis.
Conduct variance analysis and assist in preparing management reporting decks.
Perform accounting activities including reconciliations, journal entries, and month-end close tasks.
Assist in audit preparation, documentation, and compliance activities.
Partner with business teams to analyse costs, revenue, profitability, and operational efficiencies.
Support financial modelling, scenario planning, and KPI tracking.
Assist in treasury operations such as cash flow management, banking coordination, and investment documentation.
Conduct process reviews, identify gaps, and support internal audit activities.
Prepare data packs, dashboards, and analysis for leadership decision-making.
Work with cross-functional teams to support strategic and operational finance initiatives.




Key Requirements:

Chartered Accountant (CA) – recently qualified
Strong understanding of financial statements, accounting concepts, and Ind-AS.
Proficiency in MIS reporting, Excel (advanced functions), and large dataset analysis.
Working knowledge of ERP systems and finance tools preferred.
Good communication and stakeholder management skills.
High attention to detail with strong problem-solving ability.
Ability to adapt to a fast-paced environment and take ownership of tasks.

Show more

title: GSA - Front Office
description:
Company Description

Strategically located in the heart of the IT corridor- Novotel Bengaluru Outer Ring Road brings to you different categories of beautiful rooms that are sleek and contemporary designed, full of modern day amenities suitable for your stay. In proximity to numerous IT parks and corporate hubs notably- Ecospace Business Park, Prestige Techpark, Cessna Business Park, Salarpuria Techparks- Novotel Bengaluru Outer Ring Road offers the perfect residence to travelers across the globe.

Nearby to corporate offices- JP Morgan, Accenture, Honeywell, Deloitte and many more along Sarjapur Road and Marathahalli, Novotel Bengaluru Outer Ring Road brings to you seamless benefits of hosting events and conferences in well-equipped meeting spaces. Bengaluru, besides the Silicon Valley of the country, is close to some of the most significant historical and leisure destinations in South India- Mysore, Coorg, Goa, Munnar, Ooty, Pondicherry to name a few among the long list of leisure destinations.

Job Description

A Front Office Associate typically handles administrative tasks and ensures smooth operations at the reception area of a business. Their responsibilities include:


Greeting Guests: Welcoming visitors and clients, ensuring a positive first impression.
Answering Calls: Managing incoming and outgoing calls professionally.
Scheduling: Booking appointments or reservations, and coordinating meeting rooms.
Administrative Support: Managing correspondence, filing, and basic clerical duties.
Customer Assistance: Addressing inquiries or directing visitors to the appropriate departments.
Record Management: Maintaining logs and records, like visitor details or appointments.
Cash Handling (if applicable): Processing payments or handling petty cash.


Qualifications


Education: Diploma Holder or Graduate in Hotel Management.
Experience: Fresher / 1–2 years as GSA
Skills: Excellent communication, interpersonal, and computer (PMS) skills.
Personality: Courteous, well-groomed, and guest-oriented.


Additional Information

What Is In It For You


Employee benefit card offering discounted rates in Accor worldwide for you and your family
Learning programs through our Academies designed to sharpen your skills
Ability to make a difference through our Corporate Social Responsibility activities, like Planet 21
Career development opportunities with national and international promotion opportunities.


Why work for Accor?


We are far more than a worldwide leader. We welcome you as you are and you can find a job and brand that matches your personality. We support you to grow and learn every day, making sure that work brings purpose to your life, so that during your journey with us, you can continue to explore Accor’s limitless possibilities. By joining Accor, every chapter of your story is yours to write and together we can imagine tomorrow's hospitality. Discover the life that awaits you at Accor, visit https://careers.accor.com/


Do what you love, care for the world, dare to challenge the status quo! #BELIMITLESS

title: Hiring Junior Medical Coder Fresher Nursing and Physiotherapist
description:
Job Description
Position: Medical Coder


HR KAVIYA -9087738811(whatsapp)

Medical Coding is the process of converting patient health information into alpha numeric codes. Coders take medial reports from doINTors, which may include a patients condition, the doINTors diagnosis, a prescription, and whatever procedures the doINTor or healthcare provider performed on the patient, and turn that intoa set of codes, which make up a crucial part of the medical claim.

title: Intern for LHC - India Ecosystem R&D
description:
About this Position Henkel is looking for a motivated fresher to join Bioscience team, Future tech HCB R&D, Laundry and Home Care as an intern. This role offers hands-on exposure to laundry and home care innovation projects, from lab-based formulation and testing to evaluation of external innovation concepts delivering to global Henkel consumer business portfolio.

Internship Tenure: 12 months

What You´ll Do


Conduct literature review and maintain digital documentation
Plan and execute bench-scale experiments, including formulation preparation, testing, and data capture
Support evaluation of external innovation concepts and partner-led projects
Prepare presentations and concise technical documentation


What makes you a good fit


BE in Chemical Engineering, Material Science, Biochemical Engineering or MSc in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Chemistry, or Industrial Chemistry
Working knowledge of MS Office, power point and Excel; familiarity with relevant AI tools is an advantage


Some perks of joining Henkel


Diverse national and international growth opportunities
Global wellbeing standards with health and preventive care programs
Gender-neutral parental leave for a minimum of 8 weeks
Employee Share Plan with voluntary investment and Henkel matching shares
Best-in-class Group Medical Insurance policy covering employee, spouse and up to 2 children
Competitive accident and term life policies for up to 3 times annual gross salary
Progressive OPD policy of INR 30,000 for employee, spouse and up to 2 children


At Henkel, we come from a broad range of backgrounds, perspectives, and life experiences. We believe the uniqueness of all our employees is the power in us. Become part of the team and bring your uniqueness to us! We look for a diverse team of individuals who possess different backgrounds, experiences, personalities and mindsets.

title: Sales Associate (Fresher Hiring) in Pune, Jaipur, Bangalore
description:
Key Responsibilities


Engage with parents and adult learners and schedule high-impact 1:1 video counseling sessions
Conduct consultative, value-driven counseling, address objections, and influence decision-makers toward successful enrollments
Manage and optimize the complete sales lifecycle from first interaction to final conversion, ensuring consistent follow-ups and closures


Why Sales At PlanetSpark Are a Game-changer


Warm, high-intent leads only: Connect with prospects who have already attended a demo class, zero cold calling, higher conversion potential
Best-in-class sales training: Access industry-leading training, live coaching, hands-on mentorship, and real-time learning from top sales performers
Accelerated career progression: Experience rapid growth opportunities, fast promotions, and performance-driven salary hikes
Recognition-driven culture: Shine in weekly reward and recognition programs that celebrate top achievers
Unlimited earning potential: Enjoy uncapped incentives with no ceiling on your success


About Company: PlanetSpark is on a mission to build the next generation of confident speakers and creative writers. We are a global company impacting over 11 countries through live 1:1 personalized classes on public speaking and creative writing through handpicked top 1% of teachers. Our kids participate in gripping debates, create viral YouTube videos, start their podcast channels, perform stand-up comedy, write nail-biting mystery stories, and become confident and fearless speakers. PlanetSpark is on its journey to becoming the global leader in the large and untapped communication skills segment. We are a 'Series-A' startup funded by some top VCs and are on a 30% month-on-month growth curve. We have our footprint in India, the Middle East, North America, and Australia. Come join a passionate team of over 500 young and energetic members and 400+ expert and handpicked teachers on this roller coaster ride to build the most loved brand for kids who will move the world.

title: Technical Solution Research Intern
description:
Technical Solution Research


Position: Intern (Fresher)


Department: Solutions



Role Overview




We are seeking a highly motivated fresher with a strong interest in technology and a willingness to learn. The Technical Solution Research Intern will support the Solutions team with technology research, solution structuring, documentation, presentation preparation, and competitive analysis. This role is ideal for candidates looking to develop foundational skills in solution design, pre-sales support, and technical evaluation.









Key Responsibilities




Conduct research on products, technologies, solutions, and industry trends.


Assist in developing solution designs, architecture diagrams, and technical proposals.


Prepare comparison sheets, technical documentation, and structured reports.


Create and support paper presentations and technical presentations for internal and client use.


Support the pre-sales and solutions teams with data gathering and analysis.


Maintain research notes, product catalogs, and internal knowledge base content.


Assist in preparing technical documentation, case studies, and knowledge-sharing materials.


Participate in discussions for solution improvement and research innovation.









Skills Required




Basic understanding of hardware, networking, cloud technologies, or software systems.


Strong analytical, research, and documentation abilities.


Good presentation and communication skills.


Ability to create structured documents, reports, and presentations.


Auto CAD 2D or 3D Designing.

Proficiency in MS Office and online research tools.


Willingness to learn new technologies and adapt quickly.









Eligibility Criteria




Freshers with Mechanical, Electronics, Electrical, or related engineering backgrounds.


BE / B.Tech graduates or final-year students are eligible to apply.


Candidates with interest or exposure to research, documentation, and technical presentations will be preferred.

title: Data Analyst -Treasury ( Freshers)
description:
Job Title: Data Analyst (Treasury Mid office)

Department: Treasury – Debt & Lending Alliances

Location: Propelld Corporate Office, HSR Bangalore

Experience: Freshers

Job Type: Full-Time




About Propelld:

Propelld is a leading fintech NBFC focused on providing innovative financial solutions in the education sector. We are data-driven, using cutting-edge analytics to offer personalized loan products and services to our clients.




Job Summary:

We are seeking a skilled personnel for Treasury mid office / Data Analyst with 2-3 years of experience, strong proficiency in Excel, and a solid understanding of financial numbers and treasury operations. The ideal candidate will gather, analyze, and present data-driven insights to help optimize product offerings, streamline operations, and enhance the customer experience.




Key Responsibilities:

Perform data collection, cleaning, and analysis of large datasets from multiple sources, including loan performance, customer data, financial transactions, and treasury operations.

Utilize Excel for advanced data analysis, including pivot tables, VLOOKUPs, macros, and complex formulas to generate insights.

Build and maintain automated reports and interactive dashboards to track key financial metrics using Excel, Tableau.

Support decision-making processes by providing actionable insights and trends derived from data, particularly focusing on financial and treasury-related information.

Collaborate with product, marketing, and operations teams to improve business performance through data-backed recommendations.

Conduct A/B testing and statistical analysis to evaluate the impact of business experiments and initiatives.

Use SQL for querying databases to extract and manipulate data efficiently.

Ensure the accuracy, consistency, and quality of data through validation and best practices, with a specific focus on treasury and financial data.

Present findings to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including senior management.




Skills & Qualifications:

Preferred is Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Economics, Finance, Computer Science, or a related field.

Strong expertise in Excel for data analysis and reporting, including advanced functions like pivot tables, macros, and formula-based analysis, especially with financial and treasury data.

Experience with SQL for data extraction and manipulation.

Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Tableau, Power BI.

Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret complex datasets and provide actionable insights, particularly in financial contexts.

Experience with financial numbers and treasury operations is a primary requirement.

Strong attention to detail and commitment to data accuracy.

Excellent communication skills for presenting data-driven insights to cross-functional teams.




What We Offer:

A fast-paced work environment in a growing fintech company.

Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits.

Learning and growth opportunities within a collaborative, inclusive team culture.

Show more

title: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee
description:
Position: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee

Locations: Bangalore

Job Type: Full Time

Work Type: Onsite

Shift Timing: Night Shifts

Timing: 6:30 PM to 3:30 AM IST (Monday to Friday)

Transportation: Both Pick and Drop




Overview




TekWissen Group is a workforce management provider throughout India and many other countries in the world.




Job Description:




We are hiring passionate and motivated fresh graduates who are eager to build a career in US IT Recruitment.
As a US IT Recruiter, you will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and submitting potential candidates for various IT positions with our clients in the United States.
You will work closely with Account Managers and delivery leads to understand client requirements and ensure timely and quality submissions.
This is a full-time onsite position designed to train and mold freshers into skilled recruitment professionals in the highly dynamic US staffing industry.

Responsibilities:

Understanding Client Requirements (IT or Non-IT)
Regularly interact with Account Managers and Team Leads to get complete clarity on job requirements.
Understand the technical and functional aspects of each job role (skills, experience level, domain, and location).
Prioritize open requisitions based on urgency and importance.

Candidate Sourcing & Screening:

Use various sourcing channels such as job portals (Dice, Monster, CareerBuilder, etc.), LinkedIn, internal databases, networking, and referrals.
Perform keyword searches and Boolean searches to identify suitable profiles.
Screen candidates through phone/video interviews to evaluate communication skills, technical capabilities, availability, and salary expectations.
Ensure a high level of candidate quality before submission.

Resume Submission & Coordination:

Format and present resumes professionally before sharing with the Account Manager or client.
Maintain a quick turnaround time for candidate submissions to meet tight deadlines.
Follow up regularly with candidates to ensure their availability and interest.
Coordinate interviews between candidates and clients; track feedback and results.

Recruitment Tools & Documentation:

Maintain accurate records of candidate details, job status, and communication history using Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).
Update internal databases and track candidate progress throughout the recruitment lifecycle.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

Education: Bachelor's degree (Any discipline).
Excellent communication skills is a must (spoken and written English).
Strong interpersonal skills, positive attitude, and willingness to learn.
Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work in a fast-paced environment and Proficient in using MS Office tools.




TekWissen Group is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity.

title: Trainee, Project Management
description:
Company Description

At Konecranes, we believe that great customer experience is built on the people behind the Konecranes name. Everything we do, we do with passion and drive. We believe diversity drives business success and is the foundation for our growth. We welcome different backgrounds and skills that enrich our community and we promote a place where we can ALL be ourselves. This is what makes Konecranes a unique place to work.

Job Description

Job Summary:

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Trainee, Project Management to join our team. As a Project Management Trainee, you will assist in planning, executing, and closing projects under the guidance of senior project managers. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in managing real-world projects across various domains.

Key Responsibilities:


Organizing Kick off meeting for all assigned new order with Internal stake Holders for smooth order transfer.
Preparation and control of schedules/project plans for all orders.
Conduct regular planning & review meetings to ensure project timelines.
Single window for all communication with Customer in regard to approvals, project schedules and delivery plans.
Organizing Inspections as required under QAP.
Coordination with site team for schedules and ensuring project timelines.
Project milestone update to customer.
Coordination with design team for the detail engineering.
Cost management/Budget control with the help of senior manager.
SAP Knowledge would be an extra advantage.
Coordination with commercial team on AR (account receivables).
Coordination with site team for project closure.
Maintain project documentation and ensure compliance with internal processes
Awareness of ISO 14001 & 45001 Standards


Qualifications

Diploma (DET) – Electrical/Mechanical.

Experience: Fresher or 0-1year experience.

Competencies and skills, we expect for this role:


Excellent written and verbal communication
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); familiarity with tools like SAP & MS Project is a plus.
Ability to work with team to achieve goals.
Target Driven
Eagerness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment


Additional Information

What we offer you:

In return, we can offer you exciting and challenging Specialist – Project Management and flexible working environment to form a part of the Konecranes & Demag Industrial Cranes India team, you will create value added support locally and in delivering services as per our Lifting People Strategy.

Please apply through www.konecranes.com/career

Konecranes moves what matters. We are a global leader in material handling solutions, serving a broad range of customers across multiple industries. We consistently set the industry benchmark, from everyday improvements to the breakthroughs at moments that matter most, because we know we can always find a safer, more productive and sustainable way. That's why, with 16 000+ professionals in over 50 countries, we are trusted every day to lift, handle and move what the world needs.

Konecranes is committed to ensuring that all employees and job applicants are treated fairly in an environment which is free from any form of discrimination.

description:
At JTI we celebrate differences, and everyone truly belongs. 46,000 people from all over the world are continuously building their unique success story with us. 83% of employees feel happy working at JTI.

To make a difference with us, all you need to do is bring your human best.

What will your story be? Apply now!

Learn more jti.com

Bright Up Graduate – Madrid 

  

What This Position Is About - Purpose  

Are you a recent graduate or finishing your degree? 

Start your professional career at JTI Iberia, a multinational company that is a leader in its field, with continuous and sustainable growth within its industry.

Apply to our professional development program ‘Bright Up’! 

  

What This Program Is About  


Professional Development program for recent graduates
Duration 2 years. 
Full time position. 
Rotations in different departments. 
Mentor support and ongoing training. 
Access to JTI internal vacancies.

title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
description:
About the Company

ZeTheta Algorithms (www.zetheta.com) is a FinTech start-up which has been recently set up and is developing innovative AI tools. https://www.instagram.com/zetheta.official/




About the Role

We give a chance to every talented and motivated student/ fresher intern to develop AI models from scratch within a 2-month timeframe and show case their talents. This is an extraordinary opportunity for a self-driven, technically skilled student to build a complete enterprise-grade system that incorporates cutting-edge AI technologies including deep learning.




Application Process

Join us through online enrolment through this link https://www.zetheta.com/linkedin-apply/ and simply submit your updated CV. We do not conduct any interview or assessment. All motivated early career talent are welcome to take up the role to show case their skills.




Responsibilities

Design and implement complete AI models following provided specifications.
Develop both frontend and backend components of the platform.
Create and integrate AI modules.
Design and optimize database schema and queries. Ensure system security, especially for sensitive identity verification data.
Deploy the solution using zero-cost cloud services.
Document code, APIs, and system architecture.
Complete the entire project within the 2-month timeline.




Qualifications

No experience required. Preferably a student currently pursuing or a fresh graduate who has recently completed a degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, or a related field.




Required Skills (use of all LLMs permitted)

Strong programming skills in Python and JavaScript. Understanding of React.js for frontend development and Node.js for backend. Knowledge of FastAPI or similar Python web frameworks. Familiarity with database design and SQL, particularly PostgreSQL with Supabase. Deployment on AWS with CI/CD pipelines and manual environment in EC2 and S3. Understanding of basic machine learning concepts. Self-motivated with ability to work independently.




Preferred Skills (use of all LLMs permitted)

Sound knowledge of AI/ML libraries including TensorFlow, Keras, and HuggingFace Transformers. Familiarity with computer vision techniques using OpenCV. Knowledge of natural language processing concepts. Sound knowledge of facial recognition or emotion detection systems. Understanding of identity verification methodologies. Docker containerization experience. Prior work with cloud deployment on AWS.




Who Should Apply

Student or fresh graduate from any academic discipline. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Basic knowledge of Microsoft Office. Willingness to self-learn and work in a fast-paced environment.




Internship Details

Duration: Self-paced. Options of 15 days or 1, 2, 3, 4, or 6 months.

Type: Unpaid.

title: Bolsista Graduado - Inova Talentos - Bosch -Desenvolvimento de conceito de remanufatura para componentes de reposição diesel
description:
O Programa Inova Talentos tem como foco selecionar, acompanhar e desenvolver bolsistas, além de coordenar ações com organizações parceiras. Ele convida indústrias a proporem projetos de Pesquisa, Desenvolvimento e Inovação (PD&I) nos quais a participação dos bolsistas promova o crescimento profissional em PD&I empresarial e contribua para a inovação da empresa. O programa oferece bolsas para graduandos, graduados, mestres e doutores, permitindo atividades de PD&I nas instalações das empresas pelo território nacional, após aprovação da Comissão Interna do IEL Paraná.

Projeto: Desenvolvimento de conceito de remanufatura para componentes de reposição diesel.




Sobre a Oportunidade:




A Bosch Curitiba está em busca de um profissional para atuar em um projeto estratégico de inovação no setor automotivo, com foco no desenvolvimento de soluções pioneiras em remanufatura. O profissional selecionado fará parte de uma iniciativa que envolve a análise aprofundada de componentes, aplicação de know-how avançado e criação de novos designs e processos produtivos com alto valor tecnológico e relevância de mercado. Trata-se de uma oportunidade única para integrar um ambiente de excelência, contribuir diretamente com a estratégia global da empresa no mercado de reposição e atuar na vanguarda da engenharia aplicada.




Formação Acadêmica:




Graduação em Engenharias; Mecânica, Mecatrônica, Elétrica, Eletrônica, automotiva ou áreas afins.

Idioma: Inglês - Nível Intermediário




Principais Atividades:

Estudar detalhadamente o design dos injetores, identificando características construtivas, materiais empregados e possíveis pontos críticos de falha e desgaste.
Desenvolver um conceito de manufatura do produto vigente, buscando identificar possíveis oportunidades de market-sharing no mercado.
Desenvolvimento de design de produto: Auxiliar no design de componentes, buscando maior robustez do produto.
Produzir amostras em pequena escala para validação inicial, com apoio dos setores de suporte da Bosch.




Conhecimento necessário:

Conhecimento em desing de produtos bem como manufatura (montagem e teste).
Conhecimento em testes/validação de produtos.




Conhecimento desejável e Soft Skills:

Autonomia, Autogestão, responsabilidade;
Conhecimento em sistemas diesel.
Conhecimento em CAD, CREO.




Valor da bolsa (mensal): Bolsista (graduado a 1 ano) R$ 4.000

Formato de trabalho: Híbrido

Local: Curitiba – PR

title: Human Resources Intern
description:
Job Title: HR INTERN

About Us

“Capco, a Wipro company, is a global technology and management consulting firm. Awarded with Consultancy of the year in the British Bank Award and has been ranked Top 100 Best Companies for Women in India 2022 by Avtar & Seramount. With our presence across 32 cities across globe, we support 100+ clients across banking, financial and Energy sectors. We are recognized for our deep transformation execution and delivery.

WHY JOIN CAPCO?

You will work on engaging projects with the largest international and local banks, insurance companies, payment service providers and other key players in the industry. The projects that will transform the financial services industry.

MAKE AN IMPACT

Innovative thinking, delivery excellence and thought leadership to help our clients transform their business. Together with our clients and industry partners, we deliver disruptive work that is changing energy and financial services.

#BEYOURSELFATWORK

Capco has a tolerant, open culture that values diversity, inclusivity, and creativity.

CAREER ADVANCEMENT

With no forced hierarchy at Capco, everyone has the opportunity to grow as we grow, taking their career into their own hands.

DIVERSITY & INCLUSION

We believe that diversity of people and perspective gives us a competitive advantage.




We’re Hiring: HR Intern (Full-Time | Contract to Hire)

Are you a recent MBA (HR) graduate looking to kick-start your HR career with hands-on exposure to HR operations, documentation, and process excellence in a global environment? This opportunity is for you!

🔍 Role Overview

We are hiring one HR Intern to support our HR team in clean-up and validation of Employee Personnel Files (P-Files) across APAC regions ahead of an SAP migration, and to assist in revising, updating, and publishing HR Process SOPs.

This role is ideal for a detail-oriented fresher who enjoys working with documents, process improvements, and structured data.

📍 Location & Work Model

Location: EC, Bengaluru
Work Model: Hybrid – Office on Tuesday & Wednesday
Shift: 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM IST
Weekly Off: Saturday & Sunday

⏳ Contract Details

Type: Intern (Full-Time)
Duration: 3 Months (Contract-to-Hire opportunity)
Notice Period: Immediate

✅ Key Responsibilities

Clean, organize, and validate Employee Personnel Files (P-Files) for APAC employees
Ensure documents meet compliance and audit standards
Assist in reviewing, updating, and formatting HR Process SOPs
Support SOP version control and publishing
Coordinate with the Hiring Manager/Coach for documentation accuracy
Maintain strict confidentiality of employee data

🎓 Eligibility & Skills

MBA / PGDM in HR (Fresher preferred | 0–6 months experience)
Strong MS Office skills (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Excellent written and verbal communication
High attention to detail and process orientation
Willingness to work on documentation-heavy tasks




If you are keen to join us, you will be part of an organization that values your contributions, recognizes your potential, and provides ample opportunities for growth. For more information, visit www.capco.com. Follow us on Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

title: Internship or Thesis – Research & Development (m/f/d)
description:
Job Location

Kronberg

Job Description

Are you eager to lead exciting projects and have a meaningful impact? Dive into the magic behind our brands and take part in future innovations! If you're passionate about learning, eager to develop your skills, and driven to contribute to groundbreaking innovations, this internship is for you.

Join us and you could soon leave your mark in areas like natural sciences, materials, automation, sustainability, analytics through your project.

We offer both mandatory and voluntary internships as well as Bachelor and Master thesis opportunities at our German Innovation Center. We are closely connected as one European R&D community, and you can discover similar internship options at our other European Technical Innovation Centers.

YOUR ROLE

Here are some examples of projects we can usually offer:

Electrical or Mechanical or Packaging Engineering


Design of innovative mechanical & electronic concepts for smart physical prototypes
Drive for rapid prototyping through additive manufacturing technologies
Development of appealing packaging concepts with the best possible environmental footprint


Chemical or Physical Science


Lead a feasibility study for the development of a new raw material
Synthesis and characterization of super absorbing polymers for hygiene products
Formulation of hair care products and tests for various fragrance options


Natural-/Life Sciences/QA


Statistical analysis and interpretation of datasets to gain new consumer insights
Demo development to communicate benefit of new product to consumer
Test method development and validation to measure product or material performance


Computational engineering or Modelling and Simulation


Simulation and modeling of complex fluids and materials to predict product or process performance
Digitalization of manufacturing and supply chain processes
Development of coaching algorithms and gamification concepts for personalized consumer experience


Job Qualifications

YOUR PROFILE


You are a highly motivated and curious bachelor’s or master’s student and have already completed at least the first two semesters of your bachelor’s
You are enrolled for the full period of your internship and study at a European university with one of the following subjects:
Engineering: Mechanical-, Electrical-, Chemical-, Industrial-, Precision-Engineering, Mechatronic, Packaging, Computational, Mathematical or equivalent
Physical Sciences: Chemistry, Polymer Chemistry, Physics, Materials Technology and Science and Mathematical Modeling & Simulation
Natural-/Life Sciences such as Chemistry, Biology, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Bio Physics, Statistics, or similar.
You are available for min. 3 and up to 12 months for an internship with a possible start every 1st of the month, for a thesis you should plan with 6 months duration
You have a track record of academic excellence and solid technical skills
You work effectively with diverse groups of people by embracing creativity, innovation, curiosity and initiative.
You demonstrate outstanding analytical and problem-solving skills, a drive for leadership, and a strong passion for technical challenges
You can communicate proficiently in English (written and spoken)


WHAT WE OFFER


Exciting work and responsibility from Day 1.
A competitive internship salary (monthly starting salary 2,300€).
Wide range of social benefits: e.g., flexible work environment, regular intern social connects, a buddy program, campus services such as fitness center and canteen etc.
A customized personal development plan including relevant coaching, mentorship, training-on-the-job, and a large portfolio of individual upskilling opportunities.
The experience to be an integral part of our multi-functional teams of passionate and inspiring people with flat hierarchies to get to know the unique P&G culture.
The chance to receive a full-time employment offer to start after your studies with diverse career perspectives including new job assignments every 2-3 years to gain experience in different areas and the opportunity to work abroad.
Opportunity to engage in our various employee programs: WeBelong Team & New Hire Network activities, GABLE Network & other affinity groups, Inspirational Leadership Events, Sports groups for running & football etc.
Collaborate & manage multi-functional teams with international spirit, work with colleagues across regions and all levels.
The option to combine your internship with your Bachelor / Master Thesis.


APPLICATION

To optimally prepare for our online assessment & interviews, make sure you fully understand our application process.


CV in English
Copy of university diploma (if applicable) and transcript
Copy of relevant work, internship and volunteering certificates or reference letters


Please upload all documents in the "CV/Resume" field. Incomplete applications may lead to delays in the recruitment process.

At P&G #weseeequal

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. At P&G, we strive to build a culture where everyone feels welcome, included, and able to bring their full selves to work.

We ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process. Please click here if you require an accommodation during the application process and please make sure to wait to hear back from us regarding your accommodation before proceeding with the online assessment. We thank you in advance for your patience.

Job Schedule

Full time

Job Number

R000139944

Job Segmentation

Internships

title: Selezioni Aperte - Ottima opportunità per studenti - Catania

criteria.Industries: Restaurants, Advertising Services, and Professional Training and Coaching

title: Internship or Thesis – Research & Development (m/f/d)
description:
Job Location

Kronberg

Job Description

Are you eager to lead exciting projects and have a meaningful impact? Dive into the magic behind our brands and take part in future innovations! If you're passionate about learning, eager to develop your skills, and driven to contribute to groundbreaking innovations, this internship is for you.

Join us and you could soon leave your mark in areas like natural sciences, materials, automation, sustainability, analytics through your project.

We offer both mandatory and voluntary internships as well as Bachelor and Master thesis opportunities at our German Innovation Center. We are closely connected as one European R&D community, and you can discover similar internship options at our other European Technical Innovation Centers.

YOUR ROLE

Here are some examples of projects we can usually offer:

Electrical or Mechanical or Packaging Engineering


Design of innovative mechanical & electronic concepts for smart physical prototypes
Drive for rapid prototyping through additive manufacturing technologies
Development of appealing packaging concepts with the best possible environmental footprint


Chemical or Physical Science


Lead a feasibility study for the development of a new raw material
Synthesis and characterization of super absorbing polymers for hygiene products
Formulation of hair care products and tests for various fragrance options


Natural-/Life Sciences/QA


Statistical analysis and interpretation of datasets to gain new consumer insights
Demo development to communicate benefit of new product to consumer
Test method development and validation to measure product or material performance


Computational engineering or Modelling and Simulation


Simulation and modeling of complex fluids and materials to predict product or process performance
Digitalization of manufacturing and supply chain processes
Development of coaching algorithms and gamification concepts for personalized consumer experience


Job Qualifications

YOUR PROFILE


You are a highly motivated and curious bachelor’s or master’s student and have already completed at least the first two semesters of your bachelor’s
You are enrolled for the full period of your internship and study at a European university with one of the following subjects:
Engineering: Mechanical-, Electrical-, Chemical-, Industrial-, Precision-Engineering, Mechatronic, Packaging, Computational, Mathematical or equivalent
Physical Sciences: Chemistry, Polymer Chemistry, Physics, Materials Technology and Science and Mathematical Modeling & Simulation
Natural-/Life Sciences such as Chemistry, Biology, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Bio Physics, Statistics, or similar.
You are available for min. 3 and up to 12 months for an internship with a possible start every 1st of the month, for a thesis you should plan with 6 months duration
You have a track record of academic excellence and solid technical skills
You work effectively with diverse groups of people by embracing creativity, innovation, curiosity and initiative.
You demonstrate outstanding analytical and problem-solving skills, a drive for leadership, and a strong passion for technical challenges
You can communicate proficiently in English (written and spoken)


WHAT WE OFFER


Exciting work and responsibility from Day 1.
A competitive internship salary (monthly starting salary 2,300€).
Wide range of social benefits: e.g., flexible work environment, regular intern social connects, a buddy program, campus services such as fitness center and canteen etc.
A customized personal development plan including relevant coaching, mentorship, training-on-the-job, and a large portfolio of individual upskilling opportunities.
The experience to be an integral part of our multi-functional teams of passionate and inspiring people with flat hierarchies to get to know the unique P&G culture.
The chance to receive a full-time employment offer to start after your studies with diverse career perspectives including new job assignments every 2-3 years to gain experience in different areas and the opportunity to work abroad.
Opportunity to engage in our various employee programs: WeBelong Team & New Hire Network activities, GABLE Network & other affinity groups, Inspirational Leadership Events, Sports groups for running & football etc.
Collaborate & manage multi-functional teams with international spirit, work with colleagues across regions and all levels.
The option to combine your internship with your Bachelor / Master Thesis.


APPLICATION

To optimally prepare for our online assessment & interviews, make sure you fully understand our application process.


CV in English
Copy of university diploma (if applicable) and transcript
Copy of relevant work, internship and volunteering certificates or reference letters


Please upload all documents in the "CV/Resume" field. Incomplete applications may lead to delays in the recruitment process.

At P&G #weseeequal

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. At P&G, we strive to build a culture where everyone feels welcome, included, and able to bring their full selves to work.

We ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process. Please click here if you require an accommodation during the application process and please make sure to wait to hear back from us regarding your accommodation before proceeding with the online assessment. We thank you in advance for your patience.
